name: collab-toolkit
description: Browser automation toolkit wrapping vercel-labs/agent-browser. 5 read-only office-collaboration skills (Asana / Slack / Notion / Google Calendar / Gmail) — search, list, fetch via agent-browser's official text-snapshot conventions (read the indented @eN tree, click by ref). Supports EN / zh-TW (繁體中文) / ja (日本語) UI labels via per-protocol Localized labels tables. Dedicated profile by default, shared opt-in via --shared. URL-based login verification (multi-locale title patterns). Headless background after one-time /collab-setup. ⚠️ Claude Code CLI only — Cowork sandbox blocks browser launch.
